flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Northwestern Oklahoma State University rose 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($15.2k → $17.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northwestern Oklahoma State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Northwestern Oklahoma State University fell 28% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.3k → $6.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Northwestern Oklahoma State University fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.4k → $11.7k).
